decision: Place DraftResolver in crates/ta-changeset/src/draft_resolver.rs rather than a new draft_store.rs
rationale: There is no DraftStore struct in the codebase — packages are loaded directly from the filesystem in draft.rs. A standalone resolve_draft(packages, id) function achieves the same goal without unnecessary abstraction.
alternatives: Keep all resolution logic in apps/ta-cli/src/commands/draft.rs

decision: Added shortref/seq handling to resolve_draft_id_flexible in draft.rs rather than replacing with the new crate function
rationale: resolve_draft_id_flexible already handles 7+ formats and is used by 20+ call sites. Adding the missing shortref/seq case is minimal and surgical. The new crate module provides the canonical API for new code.
alternatives: Refactor all 20+ callers to use the new crate API

decision: Added description: Option<String> to ConstitutionRule for the identifier-consistency policy rule
rationale: identifier-consistency is a design policy, not a code pattern — inject_fns/restore_fns/patterns don't apply. A description field lets it carry human-readable intent without needing a separate struct type.
